fastestPathSubtitle: Resolve these priorities in order for the fastest route to production.
productionBlockersSubtitle: Copy a production-grade fix prompt and paste it into Cursor or Claude Code.
criticalBlockersSubtitle: Generate a safe fix prompt and paste it into Cursor or Claude Code — smallest possible safe change only.
aiUnavailableDeterministic: AI summary unavailable. The deterministic Production Verdict remains authoritative.

ready_to_ship.label: Ready to Ship
ready_to_ship.headline: READY TO SHIP
ready_to_ship.description: No production blockers. Meets the current readiness threshold.
ready_to_ship.message: Your application is ready to ship.

almost_ready.label: Almost Ready
almost_ready.headline: ALMOST READY
almost_ready.description: Close to shipping. Resolve remaining blockers on your fastest path forward.

needs_improvement.label: Needs Improvement
needs_improvement.headline: NEEDS IMPROVEMENT
needs_improvement.message: Your application needs a focused production pass.

not_ready.label: Not Ready to Ship
not_ready.headline: NOT READY TO SHIP
not_ready.message: Do not ship this version yet.

insufficient_data.label: More Analysis Required
insufficient_data.headline: MORE ANALYSIS REQUIRED
insufficient_data.description: Not enough repository coverage for a responsible production decision.
insufficient_data.message: SequrAI needs more information before issuing a responsible verdict.

analysis_failed.label: Analysis Failed
analysis_failed.headline: ANALYSIS FAILED
analysis_failed.description: The latest analysis did not complete successfully.
analysis_failed.message: We could not complete this production review.
